title: Custom Exceptions & Async Error Handling
prompt_md: Define a custom exception `class ValidationError(Exception)`. Then write `async def safe_parse(s)` that tries to return `int(s)`. If `int(s)` raises a `ValueError`, catch it and return `-1` instead. e.g. `safe_parse("7")` -> `7`, `safe_parse("x")` -> `-1`.
starter_code:
class ValidationError(Exception):
    pass

async def safe_parse(s):
    pass
hints: Use `try: return int(s)` and `except ValueError: return -1`.
